title: Say ‘cheese’ and saddle up for the 7Weekspoort Challenge
description: KAROO NEWS -  Entries are now open for...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"KAROO NEWS -  Entries are now open for one of the Western Cape’s most scenic endurance events, the Ladismith Cheese 7Weekspoort MTB & Trail Run Challenge, taking place near Ladismith on 3 and 4 October.","html":"KAROO NEWS - Entries are now open for one of the Western Cape’s most scenic endurance events, the Ladismith Cheese 7Weekspoort MTB & Trail Run Challenge, taking place near Ladismith on 3 and 4 October."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Set in the heart of the Karoo, framed by the Seweweekspoort, this annual event continues to attract runners and mountain bikers from across the province and beyond."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Hosted at Karoo62Escapes along the iconic R62, the challenge combines tough racing with unforgettable landscapes and warm Karoo hospitality.","html":"Hosted at Karoo62Escapes along the iconic R62, the challenge combines tough racing with unforgettable landscapes and warm Karoo hospitality."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Trail runners may choose between 10km and 18km routes that wind through rugged terrain and river crossings, while mountain bikers can line up for the 30km, 40km or the demanding 85km ride, widely regarded as the flagship distance of the event.","html":"Trail runners may choose between 10km and 18km routes that wind through rugged terrain and river crossings, while mountain bikers can line up for the 30km, 40km or the demanding 85km ride, widely regarded as the flagship distance of the event."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Trail runners may choose between the 10km and 18km routes. Photo: Gerber Sports Photography","html":"Trail runners may choose between the 10km and 18km routes. Photo: Gerber Sports Photography"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The Ladismith Cheese 7Weekspoort Challenge has become known not only for its testing routes and breathtaking scenery, but also for its festive atmosphere, drawing families, supporters and outdoor enthusiasts to the area for a full weekend of sport and celebration.","html":"The Ladismith Cheese 7Weekspoort Challenge has become known not only for its testing routes and breathtaking scenery, but also for its festive atmosphere, drawing families, supporters and outdoor enthusiasts to the area for a full weekend of sport and celebration."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"With the entries already open, organisers are encouraging participants to secure their spot early for what promises to be another memorable edition of this popular Karoo adventure. For more information or to enter visit 7Weekspoort MTB and Trail Run Challenge.","html":"With the entries already open, organisers are encouraging participants to secure their spot early for what promises to be another memorable edition of this popular Karoo adventure. For more information or to enter visit 7Weekspoort MTB and Trail Run Challenge."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
